concept.description: A standalone project idea, pattern, implementation detail, or decision topic.

entity.description: A concrete component, service, package, API, person, team, or artifact.

comparison.description: A side-by-side analysis of alternatives, designs, tools, or approaches.

overview.description: A map page that orients readers across related decisions, components, or concepts.

seedPages.summary: Map of active, superseded, and related architectural decisions.
